summary: What if your salary stops one day? This video brings together insights from three different conversations to challenge common retirement assumptions:

tool.label: Real Retirement
tool.reason: Find the corpus you actually need to retire, and whether your current savings get you there.

seo.title: The biggest retirement risk is having only one income
seo.description: What if your salary stops one day? This video brings together insights from three different conversations to challenge common retirement

takeaways.text: Retirement is not an age, it is a number: the question is not when you turn a certain age but how large a corpus your life will actually need.
Inflation quietly multiplies today's expenses, so the amount you will need later is far bigger than what your costs look like right now.
Earning from only one skill or one income stream is the biggest retirement risk, because the whole plan wobbles the day that single source stops.
Starting early, even with small amounts, changes the final outcome completely, which is why time in the plan matters more than the size of the first step.
Discipline in staying the course matters more than hunting for the best fund, and the goal is clarity, independence and choices rather than fear.
